title: Festival of Light
prompt: You arrive in a town glowing with small lamps. A family explains that the lights represent hope and the victory of light over darkness. Which tradition celebrates this?
reflection: Why do many cultures use light as a symbol of hope?

title: The Middle Way
prompt: You hear a teaching about balance, avoiding extremes, and walking a path of moderation. Which tradition is most associated with this idea?
reflection: Why might balance be considered wisdom?

title: Daily Prayer
prompt: You observe a group pausing their day to pray at specific times, facing the same direction. Which tradition is this most associated with?
reflection: How can daily rituals shape a person’s mindset?

title: Ancient Texts
prompt: You encounter a community studying ancient laws and teachings from the Torah. Which tradition is this?
reflection: Why are sacred texts important across cultures?

title: Yin and Yang
prompt: You learn about balance between opposing forces—light and dark, active and passive. Which philosophy teaches this?
